sorry_no_data: Sorry, there is no data on this page

receiveTimeout: Response timed out. Please try again.

noInternetDescription: It seems you're offline. Please check your network connection and try again.
security_warning_description: To protect your data and ensure the best experience, this app cannot be used on devices with modified systems or developer settings enabled.
security_warning_rooted_subtitle: Your device system has been modified.
security_warning_dev_mode_subtitle: Please disable USB debugging & developer options.
security_warning_footer: Please restore your device to its original state to continue using the application.
change_language_desc: Choose the language that suits you to track your accounts easily
language_change_info: Changing the language will update the app interface and printed reports as well. Make sure to review currency settings after the change.
customer_debts_desc: Manage outstanding balances and credit terms.
login_subtitle: Manage your project professionally and easily.
validation_password_length: Password must be at least 6 characters
quick_add_desc: This operation will be added immediately to the daily activity log and update the balance.
user_not_found: User not found! Please login again.
validation_customer_name_required: Customer name is required for debts
confirm_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
confirm_delete_month_message: All expenses in this month will be deleted. Do you want to proceed?

insight_profit_daily_decrease: You currently earned {netProfit} EGP, which is {difference} EGP less than yesterday.
insight_profit_weekly_increase: Your average weekly profit is {netProfit} EGP, which is {difference} EGP more than last week.
insight_profit_weekly_decrease: Your average weekly profit is {netProfit} EGP, which is {difference} EGP less than last week.
insight_profit_monthly_increase: Your monthly profit is {netProfit} EGP, which is {difference} EGP more than last month.
insight_profit_monthly_decrease: Your monthly profit is {netProfit} EGP, which is {difference} EGP less than last month.
insight_income_up_cafe: Income increased due to higher cafe sales ☕
insight_income_up_ps: Income increased due to higher PlayStation sales 🎮
insight_ps_low_contribution: PlayStation contributes less to total income compared to the cafe
insight_profit_zero: Your current expense rate equals your income rate, so the net profit is zero, and this is a very incorrect indicator.
